work_experience.responsibilities: Completed Flutter development course, gaining expertise in Dart, UI design, and advanced Flutter topics. Expanded skills to include NestJS, React, JavaScript, TypeScript, and currently learning Java for Spring backend development.

projects.name: Music Streaming App Project
projects.description: Developed a Flutter music streaming app, utilizing GetX and Provider for state management and JSON files for data storage. This project served as an initial learning experience in Flutter development.

projects.name: Supercar Showroom App Project
projects.description: Created a Flutter mobile app for supercar showroom appointment bookings. Features include a Flutter frontend, simulated backend with SQLite, Riverpod for state management, and Gemini API integration for supercar specification comparison.

projects.name: Movie Ticket Booking App Project
projects.description: Led a team to develop a movie ticket booking app with Flutter frontend and NestJS backend. Responsible for backend design and task delegation, utilizing Provider for state management. Backend deployed on Render with Vietnix database hosting.
